reviews.review_title: Any chance I could join the mod team?
reviews.review_description: Any chance I could join the mod team again i know i did something bad in the past but I would never try to do something like that again and I really wanna help make the game i got a pc too so I could actully help this time

This game is genuinely fantastic, and I'm not just saying that because we’re partnered. While it has horror elements, it offers a wealth of enjoyable features beyond that. With engaging player vs. player (PVP) modes and a captivating forest map, there’s so much to explore. It’s an outstanding choice to play with friends, and I wholeheartedly recommend you get it.

reviews.review_title: Game is very interesting and fun
reviews.review_description: I like the game because it offered a different array of game modes including PVP, Forest, Lazer Maze, Horror, Only Up, and Speedy Wall. The game modes can vary from what you want to play. In the PVP map you get to fling the other players across the map, and in the Lazer Maze you have to avoid the lazers. All of those game modes make the game really fun to play with friends.

reviews.review_title: i met the creator while doing a glitch
reviews.review_description: and out of the map i found a lightsaber a mod torso thingy a shark moderator holdable and hats and two badges and also a kid camera floating out of the map it was like huge and also the level three monsters tiny beside the halloween pumpkin on the computer but yeah he just loves hitting out of the map and the mods that i found in the mod room we're fly platforms and speed boost and right now noclip is deleted that's it for the disable button for noclip
Best game ever yall should try it out
